title: 10 best herbal tinctures for adrenal fatigue
description: Siberian ginseng tinctures helps with adrenal fatigue because it has been shown to support adrenal function by stimulating the production of cortisol, a hormone that helps the body respond to stress. Additionally, its adaptogenic properties enable it to help regulate the body's response to stress, promoting balance and reducing the impact of chronic stress on the adrenals.
